memberdef.argsstring: (self, EngineConfig config, dict[str, dict[int|Classification|str, BaseView]]|None views=None)
memberdef.name: __init__

para.verbatim: Initialize the game engine with provided configuration and optional views.
Register a world factory under a name.
Set the window pointer for the game window.
Initialize the renderer based on the game window type.
Initialize views for the game engine.

memberdef.argsstring: (self, str scene_name, type[BaseScene] scene_class, **dict[str, object] kwargs)
memberdef.name: add_scene

para.verbatim: Add a scene to the scene manager.
Register a sprite to be used as an empty inventory slot.
Change to a registered scene by name.
Check if ImGui wants to capture keyboard input.
